homepage.headline: Professional Crane & Construction Safety Programs
homepage.subheading: Practical safety knowledge focused on field documentation, standards alignment, and procedures designed for real construction and lifting operations.
homepage.overviewText1: This site demonstrates professional safety systems, procedural controls, and field knowledge for crane and construction operations.
homepage.overviewText2: It is structured as a technical reference environment that connects planning, execution, and compliance through practical documentation and clear workflows.
homepage.companyLinksText: Navigate core company knowledge areas and professional reference modules.

authorityCards.towerSummary: Operational planning, pre-lift controls, communication protocol, and load path discipline for tower crane work.
authorityCards.riggingSummary: Engineered rigging methods, sling selection, critical lift sequencing, and controlled load movement.
authorityCards.docsSummary: Field-ready records for FLHA, SWP, inspections, permits, and verification workflows.
authorityCards.standardsSummary: Structured reference mapping for WorkSafeBC OHSR, CSA, ASME B30, and manufacturer requirements.

footer.disclaimer: References may include WorkSafeBC OHSR, CSA, ASME B30, EN standards, FEM, Technical Safety BC, and manufacturer requirements.
footer.verification: Employers must verify current regulatory requirements before execution. Manufacturer instructions and site-specific engineering requirements must always be followed.
